title: carex drukyulensis
intro: Carex drukyulensis, a type of sedge plant native to the Eastern Himalayas and China, belongs to the family Cyperaceae and is commonly known for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cold, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Health benefits associated with Carex drukyulensis include relief from coughs, sore throats, and bronchitis, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Carex drukyulensis can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
